meaning: ring [物]罗兰环(用磁性材料制成,用以研究材料的性能)
examples: David Rowland is almost certain to succeed him as chairman on January 1.
JEFFREY ROWLAND: "Almost all children in the world get rotavirus."
According to Rowland, the only previous comparable event was in 2004.
Grammy Award-winning artist Kelly Rowland performed at the event, hosted by actress and director Drew Barrymore.
Take That's Gary Barlow, pop singer Kelly Rowland and Tulisa Contostavlos of N-Dubz have joined the panel.
